summary: Bug fixes and features tested successfully. Card sharing navigation (SMS/Email) via URLSearchParams working correctly. Contact matching API works for 10 out of 11 scenarios. Send a Card flow from home screen navigates correctly to create-card page with card types.

minor.issue: Phone matching by last 10 digits creates duplicate contacts when phone format differs significantly (e.g., formatted vs plain). This is a minor edge case - exact phone matches work.

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 VERIFIED: Share via SMS/Email buttons in create-card.tsx use navigateToThread() helper with URLSearchParams - navigates correctly to /thread/[contactId]?params
Bug Fix 2 VERIFIED: Contact matching API correctly handles phone matching (exact), name mismatch (needs_confirmation=true), and force_action options (use_existing, update_name, create_new)
Feature VERIFIED: Send a Card tile opens modal with 6 card types (congrats, birthday, anniversary, thankyou, welcome, holiday), clicking navigates to /settings/create-card?type={cardType}
Feature VERIFIED: UniversalShareModal Via Text/Email navigation works using URL string format with URLSearchParams
Code review: navigateToThread helper in create-card.tsx (lines 115-124) and UniversalShareModal.tsx (lines 139-145) correctly builds URL string with URLSearchParams
seed_data_creation: Test contacts with TEST_ prefix created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card sharing navigation bug is fixed. The navigateToThread helper uses URL string format ('/thread/{id}?params') instead of object format for reliable cross-stack navigation on web. Contact matching API handles phone (last 10 digits), email matching, name mismatch confirmation flow, and force_action options.
mocked_api_note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED - personal phone fallback used

bug_fix_1_share_via_sms_email.details: After card creation, clicking SMS/Email share navigates to /thread/[contactId] with prefilled message using URL string format

tests_passed: Find existing contact by phone exact match name
tests_failed: Phone last 10 digits matching - edge case with heavily formatted phone numbers

verified: Send a Card tile on home screen opens card type picker modal
6 card types displayed: Congrats, Birthday, Anniversary, Thank You, Welcome, Holiday
Create-card form displays with correct card type header and accent color
Via Text button visible and clickable
Via Email button visible and clickable
Phone input filled, Via Text navigates to /thread/{contactId}?mode=sms&prefill=...
Prefilled message appears in thread page message input
